sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72792" key="o)kta/eidos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτά-ειδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72792.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">containing eight ingredients,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φάρμακον</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.78</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
